name: Issues with responses using structured outputs on the API
message: We have identified and resolved an issue which resulted in issues with model responses when making use of structured outputs via the Anthropic API between 16:10 UTC on April 22 and 01:59 UTC on April 23. During this period, structured outputs containing some forms of grammar requirements returned with reduced quality. This did not impact any requests not using structured outputs, as detailed here: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/structured-outputs.

name: Some users are experiencing delays in purchasing additional API credits
message:
During the outage, all of the following were delayed:
- customer balances
- billing for standard API usage
- issuing credit auto-recharge invoices
- access shutoff/restore for $0 in credits, and for reaching spend limits

The outage has now been resolved. There is no longer a system delay for any of the above.

name: Claude.ai, Claude Code, API, and console are experiencing degraded service
message:
On October 3rd UTC (Oct 2nd PT), we experienced a service disruption affecting Claude.ai, Claude Code, and the Claude API and Console. The disruption began at approximately 1:17 AM UTC / 6:17 PM PT and was fully resolved by 3:47AM UTC / 8:47 PM PT, with all systems confirmed stable by 5:16AM UTC / 10:16 PM PT. The incident was triggered by an upstream provider error that exposed an unexpected issue in our infrastructure that affected both availability and recovery times.

During this time, you may have experienced intermittent access issues or increased error rates and latency across our platform. We have taken immediate actions to mitigate the issue.

All systems are now operating normally. We apologize for any inconvenience this disruption may have caused.

name: Elevated errors
message: The issue has been resolved (no regressions since we've been monitoring).

name: Elevated errors on Claude 4 Sonnet

name: Claude Sonnet 4 degraded performance quality
message:
From 08:45 UTC on July 8th to 02:00 UTC on July 10th, Claude Sonnet 4 experienced a degradation in quality for some requests. Users, especially tool use and Claude Code users, would have seen lower intelligence responses and malformed tool calls.

This was caused by a rollout of our inference stack, which we have since rolled back. While we often make changes intended to improve the efficiency and throughput of our models, our intention is always to retain the same model response quality.

name: Elevated errors on requests to multiple models
message:

* Claude 4 Sonnet since 15:39 UTC

We are resolving this incident.

name: Elevated error rates on API, Claude, and Console
Elevated rate limiting errors on the API
Additional Rate Limits are being applied for API customers
message: From 19:01–19:12 UTC, some users of the Anthropic API experienced elevated rate limiting errors. This has been resolved.

name: API errors elevated
message: We are experienced an elevated rate of API errors and are currently investigating

Elevated error rates in the API
message: We saw elevated error rates on the Anthropic API, including Claude.ai and console.anthropic.com. This incident is now resolved.

name: Elevated errors on Claude.ai
message: We have resolved this incident which was affecting some usage of Claude.ai and console.anthropic.com.
